description: Create the @quant/quant-tools package with core infrastructure: types, registry, permissions engine, audit trail, undo manager, and multi-tool planner. Then register all per-app tool definitions (13 apps, 5+ tools each).
steps: Create packages/quant-tools/package.json following the pattern from packages/agent-runtime/package.json. Name: @quant/quant-tools, private, type: module, scripts (build: tsc, typecheck: tsc --noEmit, test: vitest run, lint: eslint .). Dependencies: zod ^3.23.0. DevDependencies: @types/node ^22.0.0, typescript ~5.5.0, vitest ^2.0.0.
Create packages/quant-tools/tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.json with composite: true, outDir: ./dist, rootDir: ./src, include: [src/**/*], exclude: [node_modules, dist].
Create packages/quant-tools/vitest.config.ts using defineConfig from vitest/config with test: { globals: true }.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/types.ts with all core interfaces: QuantTool (id, app, name, description, inputSchema as ZodSchema<any>, outputSchema as ZodSchema<any>, permissionTier 1|2|3, optional costEstimate, optional undoRecipe, execute fn), ToolRegistry interface, ToolContext (userId, sessionId, requestedBy: 'user'|'ai'|'automation', optional confirmationCallback), ToolResult (success, optional data, optional error, optional undoId, auditId, optional cost), CostEstimate (tokens?: number, money?: {amount: number, currency: string}, timeMs?: number), UndoRecipe (description: string, handler: (undoId: string, context: ToolContext) => Promise<void>), AuditEntry (id, toolId, userId, input, output, timestamp, cost?, undoStatus: 'available'|'expired'|'executed'|'none'), ToolSearchResult.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/registry.ts implementing the ToolRegistry class: register(tool) validates with Zod then stores in Map, get(id), listByApp(app), listAll(), search(query) doing fuzzy match on name+description, execute(toolId, input, context) that validates input against inputSchema, checks permissions, runs execute fn, creates audit entry, returns ToolResult. The execute method should delegate to the permission engine for tier checks.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/permissions.ts with the PermissionEngine class: evaluateTier(tool, context) determines if execution can proceed, requestConfirmation(tier, tool, context) handles the confirmation flow (tier 1 = auto-approve, tier 2 = single confirm via callback, tier 3 = double confirm). Export helper functions: isSafeAction, requiresConfirmation, requiresDoubleConfirmation.
Create packages/quant-tools/src/audit.ts with the ToolAuditTrail class: log(entry: AuditEntry), getByTool(toolId), getByUser(userId), getRecent(limit), getAll(). Use Zod schema for validation.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/undo.ts with the UndoManager class: registerUndo(undoId, recipe, ttlMs?), executeUndo(undoId, context), canUndo(undoId), getUndoableActions(userId), prune() to remove expired entries. Default TTL 24 hours.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/planner.ts with the ToolPlanner class: plan(intent: string, availableTools: QuantTool[]) => PlannedExecution[] which parses natural language intent keywords and maps them to tool sequences. This is a keyword-based router (not AI), matching intent words against tool names/descriptions. Also executePlan(steps, context) that runs them in sequence.
Create packages/quant-tools/src/tools/index.ts that imports and re-exports all per-app tool arrays.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/tools/mail.ts with tools: send_email (tier 2), search_emails (tier 1), archive_email (tier 2), create_label (tier 2), move_to_folder (tier 2), star_email (tier 1). Each tool has proper Zod inputSchema/outputSchema, stub execute functions that return mock success responses.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/tools/chat.ts with tools: send_message (tier 2), create_group (tier 2), search_messages (tier 1), pin_message (tier 2), mute_conversation (tier 2). Stub execute functions.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/tools/calendar.ts with tools: create_event (tier 2), update_event (tier 2), delete_event (tier 3), find_free_time (tier 1), send_invite (tier 2). Stub execute functions.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/tools/docs.ts with tools: create_document (tier 2), update_document (tier 2), share_document (tier 2), add_comment (tier 2), export_document (tier 1). Stub execute functions.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/tools/drive.ts with tools: upload_file (tier 2), download_file (tier 1), share_file (tier 2), create_folder (tier 2), search_files (tier 1), delete_file (tier 3). Stub execute functions.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/tools/meet.ts with tools: create_meeting (tier 2), join_meeting (tier 2), start_recording (tier 2), end_meeting (tier 3), invite_participant (tier 2). Stub execute functions.
Create packages/quant-tools/src/tools/ai.ts with tools: ask_question (tier 1), create_automation (tier 2), list_automations (tier 1), run_automation (tier 2). Stub execute functions.
Create packages/quant-tools/src/tools/neon.ts with tools: create_post (tier 2), upload_reel (tier 2), like_post (tier 1), comment_on_post (tier 2), follow_user (tier 2). Stub execute functions.
Create packages/quant-tools/src/tools/sync.ts with tools: create_post (tier 2), join_community (tier 2), upvote (tier 1), create_space (tier 2). Stub execute functions.
Create packages/quant-tools/src/tools/tube.ts with tools: upload_video (tier 2), create_playlist (tier 2), like_video (tier 1), comment (tier 2), go_live (tier 3). Stub execute functions.
Create packages/quant-tools/src/tools/max.ts with tools: start_video_chat (tier 2), skip_match (tier 1), send_super_like (tier 2), report_user (tier 2). Stub execute functions.
Create packages/quant-tools/src/tools/edits.ts with tools: create_project (tier 2), apply_effect (tier 2), export_video (tier 2), add_to_timeline (tier 2). Stub execute functions.
Create packages/quant-tools/src/tools/ads.ts with tools: create_campaign (tier 3), pause_campaign (tier 2), set_budget (tier 3), get_analytics (tier 1). Stub execute functions.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/index.ts that re-exports all public API: types, ToolRegistryImpl class, PermissionEngine, ToolAuditTrail, UndoManager, ToolPlanner, and all tool definitions from tools/index.ts.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/__tests__/registry.test.ts with tests: register tool, get tool by id, list by app, list all, search by query, execute tool with valid input, execute tool with invalid input (schema validation failure), execute without permission. At least 8 tests.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/__tests__/permissions.test.ts with tests: tier 1 auto-approves, tier 2 calls confirmation callback once, tier 3 calls confirmation callback for double confirm, tier 2 denied when callback returns false, no callback provided for tier 2+ fails gracefully. At least 6 tests.
Create packages/quant-tools/src/__tests__/audit.test.ts with tests: log entry, get by tool, get by user, get recent with limit, validates entries with Zod. At least 5 tests.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/__tests__/planner.test.ts with tests: plan single-tool intent, plan multi-tool intent (e.g. 'find tax doc and email it'), plan returns empty for unknown intent, executePlan runs tools in sequence, executePlan stops on failure. At least 5 tests.

Create packages/quant-tools/src/__tests__/undo.test.ts with tests: register and execute undo, canUndo returns true for valid, canUndo returns false for expired, prune removes expired, getUndoableActions filters by user. At least 5 tests.

Run pnpm install to link the new package, then run pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/quant-tools, pnpm build --filter=@quant/quant-tools, pnpm test --filter=@quant/quant-tools to verify everything passes.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/quant-tools passes with zero errors
pnpm test --filter=@quant/quant-tools passes with at least 30 tests
All 13 app tool files exist with 5+ tools each (total 65+ tools registered)
Registry correctly validates input schemas via Zod
Permission engine correctly handles tier 1/2/3 flows
Undo manager supports register, execute, expire
